S1504.code_remap_justification: IMF IFS legacy lines 31 + (78-88) + 79 + 81 (Total Domestic Credit) map to the modern FOSAOP_XDC (Depository Corporations Survey: Domestic Claims, Net) aggregate. This is a CODE REMAP (modern access path to the same concept), NOT a proxy substitution. Anu Framework No Proxies rule is satisfied: same Domestic Claims aggregate, modern IFS publication convention. Per IFS_MODERNIZATION_PLAN in CH15_ADEQUACY_REPORT.

url_substitutions.rationale: Old URL returns HTTP 200 with auto-redirect; update for canonical citation hygiene.

data_substitutions.concept: IMF IFS Total Domestic Credit / Domestic Claims (code modernization, not proxy)
data_substitutions.discontinued_source: IMF IFS numeric line references (lines 31, 32, 64, 78, 79, 81, 88) — replaced post-2009 SDDS+ migration

canonical_substitute.source: IMF International Financial Statistics modern SRF-based aggregates
canonical_substitute.code_family: FOSAOP_XDC (Depository Corporations Survey: Domestic Claims, Net) for credit; PCPI_IX for CPI; FAAOP_XDC for Central Bank Claims on Central Government Net
canonical_substitute.license: IMF free-tier public API with attribution (post-2020 access)

data_substitutions.concept_match_justification: IFS legacy lines and modern SRF codes refer to the SAME sectoral aggregates by IMF's own continuity documentation. Shaikh's (line 31 + (78-88) + 79 + 81) 4-component sum equals the modern Depository Corporations Survey 'Domestic Claims (net)' aggregate FOSAOP_XDC. This is a code remap (modern access path to the same concept), NOT a concept proxy. Validation strategy: cell-by-cell comparison of FOSAOP_XDC vs Shaikh's hand-summed values over the 1948-2010 (US) and 1970-1988 (Harberger 29-country) and 1988-2011 (Ramamurthy 38-country) overlaps; tolerance ±2% level difference per year.

construction_corrections.rationale: S1506 (1948-1981) and S1507 (1982-2010) are deterministic sub-period slices of S1505. Adding `derived_subperiod` as a 4th construction category makes the parent-child relationship explicit and lets the loader produce all three series from a single source pull, avoiding vintage divergence.

S1508.figure_caption_typo_note: Fig 15.12 caption says 'table 12.1'; canonical is 'table 12.11' per narrative + appendix

S1509.citation_resolution_pending: Ramamurthy (2014) NSSR PhD — verify via ProQuest

legacy_to_modern_codes.line_31: FAAOP_XDC (Central Bank: Claims on Central Government, Net)
legacy_to_modern_codes.line_32: FOSAOP_XDC (Depository Corporations: Domestic Claims, Net) — RECOMMENDED UNIFIED AGGREGATE FOR S1504
legacy_to_modern_codes.line_78: FCAOP_XDC (ODCS: Claims on Central Government, gross)
legacy_to_modern_codes.line_88: FLAOP_XDC (ODCS: Liabilities to / Deposits of Central Government)
legacy_to_modern_codes.line_79: FCSL_XDC (ODCS: Claims on State and Local Government) — may consolidate under FCDOR_XDC depending on country
legacy_to_modern_codes.line_81: FCNI_XDC + FCHO_XDC (ODCS: Claims on Other Nonfinancial Corps + Households), or consolidated FCDP_XDC
